description: Human-reviewed lifecycle annotations layered onto deterministic script classification. These overrides do not mutate source files or change classifier evidence; they document intentional retention, review state, or approved future cleanup.

quant-db/scripts/backfill_market_categor.rationale: Backfill utility with no inbound static references; retain until market category storage/history is confirmed fully converged.

verification.notes: Set these fields true only after explicit review; maintenance will not infer them from no-ref status alone.

verification.notes: Set these fields true only after explicit review; maintenance will not infer them from no-ref status alone.
